name: check_required_documents
description: Verify that all required documents are present for a claim based on benefit type

benefit_category.description: Benefit category for the insurance claim

document_name.description: Name or title of the document

extracted_data.description: Structured data extracted from the document

submitted_documents.description: List of documents already submitted with the claim

claim_amount.description: Total claim amount for threshold-based requirements (optional)

hospital_stay_days.description: Number of hospital stay days, relevant for inpatient claims (optional)
